global.description: The ad features a light gray background with abstract shapes and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to track their finances with peace of mind.

elements.label: Light gray background
elements.description: A light gray background that fills the entire canvas, providing a neutral base for the other elements.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of circular and rectangular shapes in the center, suggesting a modern and abstract design.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape positioned towards the bottom center, adding a decorative touch to the layout.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, black text in the center reading 'Track every euro Built for peace of mind', conveying a clear message.
elements.text_content: Track every euro Built for peace of mind

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, featuring the text 'EarnPath' in a simple, modern font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom center with the text 'Learn more', designed to attract user interaction.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top left, the headline is centered, and the CTA button is at the bottom center.
